name: 兄弟肢體衝突
description: Josh在父子對峙後情緒失控，與Tristan發生肢體衝突，父親無力阻止。家族會議室從理性空間變為暴力衝突現場，視覺衝擊強烈。
tags: 積壓多年的兄弟矛盾物理化爆發

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: I'm going to show you who the real man is. Come on. Let's go. Come on. Stop. Josh, stop. That's enough.
examples.context: 積壓多年的兄弟矛盾物理化爆發
